commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=e9b5b23ea0b3013cd956b65ba90ae3f6f883b457)
commands.review_summary:
This PR replaces iMessage opt-in catchup with always-on GUID dedupe plus a stale-backlog age fence, removes catchup config/runtime/state migration, and updates docs, config baselines, and tests.

PR surface: Source -730, Tests -1100, Docs -37, Generated 0. Total -1867 across 28 files.

Reproducibility: Do we have a high-confidence way to reproduce the issue? Source-level yes for the missing default guard: current main has no default stale-age live-path suppression, and the PR adds tests for old-dated live rows; the exact bridge-recovery burst was not reproduced live in this review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Human maintainer review is needed for the shipped catchup deprecation and the dirty branch conflict; this is not a safe autonomous repair lane until that product decision is made.
